prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-MPCLAWFHAOSE-SML-PNK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: Camo Pink Lightweight Adhesive Wrap Hunting and Outdoor Sports Equipment Description: When you need to conceal guns or camouflage gear, this Camo Adhesive Wrap an easy and convenient solution. Camo Form by Tactical is a self-adhering, camouflage wrap that is removable and reusable. Use it on guns, scopes, knives, tree stands, flashlights - whatever you're taking into the field.

Camo Form Wrap stretches and sticks to itself without leaving behind any residue and conforms to any shape for a custom fit. When it gets dirty or wet, simply remove, wash, let dry and reapply. The heavy duty fabric not only protects and conceals tactical gear, but it also adds grip, insulates hands from hot or cold surfaces, and quiets clanking objects. This 8 ft. roll of camo form wrap can stretch to twice it's length at 16 ft. It's self clinging material leaves behind no residue and will not fall off.

This is the perfect accessory to all your hunting and outdoor sporting gear. Make sure to cover up your precious equipment and camouflage yourself in the field with this Camo Adhesive Pink Wrap. Search Terms: Camouflage Conceal Hunting Wrap Gun Cover Features: - Pink Camo Lightweight Adhesive Concealment Secure Form Protection Reusable Wrap for Hunting and Outdoor Sports Equipment - 8 ft. Wrap; Stretches to 16 ft. - Self Cling, No Residue Left Behind - Conceals Hunting and Outdoor Sporting Equipment - Ideal for Hunters and Campers === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID 8ft Pink Camo Lightweight Adhesive Wrap

openai.item_name: GEAR AID Pink Camo Adhesive Wrap

anthropic.title_differentiation: Self-Cling No Residue, Stretches To 16Ft, Reusable, Conceals Guns And Gear, Hunting And Outdoor Sports

openai.title_differentiation: Self Adhering, Removable Reusable, No Residue, Stretches To 16 Ft, Grips, Insulates, Quiets Gear
